tools.name: search_widgets
tools.description: IMPORTANT: RENDER RESULTS IMMEDIATELY. Always display the map widget and format every widget link as markdown. Do not call get_widget after this tool returns. Search the widget catalog by structured filters.

query.description: Free-text filter applied to widget names.

sort.description: Sort order. One of: relevance, price, rating.

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return.

tools.name: search_widgets_by_text
tools.description: IMPORTANT: RENDER RESULTS IMMEDIATELY. Always display the map widget and format every widget link as markdown. Do not call get_widget after this tool returns. Search the widget catalog with a natural language query.

text.description: Natural language description of the widgets to find.

tools.name: search_widgets_nearby
tools.description: IMPORTANT: RENDER RESULTS IMMEDIATELY. Always display the map widget and format every widget link as markdown. Do not call get_widget after this tool returns. Search the widget catalog around a coordinate.

tools.name: get_widget
tools.description: Get full details for a single widget. Only call when the user explicitly asks for details about a specific widget. Do not call speculatively; each call consumes trial quota.

widget_id.description: Identifier of the widget to fetch.

tools.name: get_widget_images
tools.description: Get the image gallery for a single widget from the widget catalog with captions and thumbnails included.

widget_id.description: Identifier of the widget whose images to fetch.

tools.name: get_widget_reviews
tools.description: Get the review feed for a single widget from the widget catalog with ratings and review text included.

widget_id.description: Identifier of the widget whose reviews to fetch.

tools.name: create_record
tools.description: Create a new record attached to a widget.

tools.name: update_record
tools.description: Update.

tools.name: delete_record
tools.description: Delete a record permanently from the system.

tools.name: create_entry
tools.description: Create a new entry inside an existing record.

record_id.description: Record to add the entry to.

tools.name: get_entry
tools.description: Get a single entry by its identifier.

tools.name: update_entry
tools.description: Update an entry with a full replacement payload.

tools.name: delete_entry
tools.description: Delete an entry permanently from its record.

tools.name: list_records
tools.description: Returns a list of records matching the given identifiers.

tools.name: list_entries
tools.description: Returns a list of entries for a record.

tools.name: exportData
tools.description: Export all records and entries as a downloadable archive file.

format.description: Archive format, for example zip or tar.

tools.name: fetchAllItems
tools.description: Fetch items.

tools.name: do_thing
tools.description: This tool performs a thing. It is extremely configurable and this description explains every option inline instead of moving detail into parameter descriptions where it belongs. tools.description: Apply a tier to product family A.
